description: SYNTHETIC data-driven demo grouping definition for the sepsis vertical. Models a single sepsis base DRG whose severity tier (MCC/CC/none) tracks the documented Severity of Illness / Risk of Mortality escalation: septic shock (extreme SOI/ROM) reaches MCC, severe sepsis with acute organ dysfunction (major SOI/ROM) reaches CC, and uncomplicated sepsis stays at the base tier. Selected by the specialty-agnostic GroupingRegistry for cases bound to the sepsis ontology. NOT a licensed grouper and NOT for real coding or billing.

tiers.title: Severe sepsis with acute organ dysfunction, major SOI/ROM (synthetic)
